title: Chat Notes
description: Manage durable assistant notes scoped to the current chat. Use set_plan for quick planning, and use notes for decisions, assumptions, preferences, open questions, and context that should remain available later in this chat.

action.description: list returns notes. upsert creates or updates a note. set_plan creates or replaces the special active plan note. delete removes one note. clear removes all notes, or notes matching category when category is provided.

note_id.description: Required for delete. Optional for upsert; omit to create a generated note id. set_plan always uses note_id plan.

title.description: Short note title. Optional for upsert and set_plan.

content.description: Note body. Required when creating a note and always required for set_plan.

category.description: Optional note category. list and clear can filter by category.

max_notes.description: Maximum notes to return. Defaults to 100.

selection.summary: Store and retrieve per-chat assistant notes, including one-step active plan capture.
selection.whenToUse: Use when you need to remember a plan, decision, assumption, preference, open question, or compact context across later turns in this same chat.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for final answers, hidden reasoning, cross-chat memory, long documents, or user files.
